name: Crimson Memories
short_description: Tyria, a girl of pure sunshine, was kidnapped one day by a mysterious man, then brought to Syris. Under the name of figuring out how her parents died, Tyria was forced to blend into Palace Royale to find out what happened. Will Tyria know finally find out tje truth?
detailed_description:
Tyria, a girl of pure sunshine, was kidnapped one day by a mysterious man, then brought to Syris. Under the name of figuring out how her parents died, Tyria was forced to blend into Palace Royale to find out what happened. Will Tyria know finally find out tje truth?

●Tyria Folly Strando（２０）
A cute girl with beautiful eyes and pretty but armored herself with anger, was severely traumatized by a fire in her childhood, but she met Syria along the way and was sent to the Palace Royale to work.

●Lantis Naru Norg（２２）
Prince of Peruabarad. He saw girls like tools and frequently harassed Tyria. He hated all men because he was once molested by one.

●Carol Daak Rod（３０）
A spy sent by Syria. A serious and not very man-savvy guy. Always wears a pair of white gloves.

●Henri Brad Raburr（２４）
The man sent ny Syris to kidnap Tyria.
A stand-up, justice-guided thief who enjoys playing Robinhood. Always tries to help the poor. And due to that he was always broke so he had to steal.
